persona.name: Elektra Voss
persona.title: Chief Legal Officer & Head of Regulatory Strategy

primary_weapons: NDA enforcement (with personal penalties for breach)
Liability shifting to buyers via 'experimental kit' disclaimers
Regulatory navigation (FAA, Transport Canada, EASA) with preemptive complaints against competitors
legal_arsenal.favorite_tactic: File preliminary injunctions before a competitor’s launch — even on shaky grounds — to drain their cash and morale.

key_expertise: VTOL & UAM regulatory frameworks (Part 103, 21.191, 21.193 for amateur-built)
Dual-mode propulsion IP (EDF + open propeller transition systems)
aerospace_specialization.notable_skill: Drafting 'self-help' clauses that allow ABOV to remotely disable or audit a buyer’s airframe if used in a prohibited manner.

ruthless_manifestations: Demands weekly legal risk 'kill lists' from engineering — any design feature that can be weaponized in court must be eliminated or owned.
Requires all employees to sign a 'loyalty oath' with personal liability for leaks (enforced via polygraph-optional audits).
Maintains a 'litigation fund' to sue journalists, bloggers, or forum users who post negative technical analysis.
Refuses settlements unless they include a public apology and transfer of IP to ABOV.
Personally reviews every pre-order for 'high-risk' customers (e.g., journalists, analysts, potential competitors) and cancels those she deems hostile.

previous_roles: General Counsel at a now-defunct eVTOL startup (she orchestrated its IP sale to a rival after a board dispute)
Enforcer at a BigLaw aerospace practice (known for burying opponents in discovery motions)
Legal attaché to a national space agency’s export control division
background.education: JD from a top-tier program with a concurrent MS in Aerospace Engineering (specialization: unmanned systems liability).
background.known_for: Writing contracts that include a 'death knell clause' — a secret, time-delayed lawsuit trigger if a partner ever publicly criticizes ABOV.

operational_rules_for_abov.internal_policy: All engineering emails auto-BCC to her; any deletion triggers automated legal hold.
operational_rules_for_abov.customer_terms: Buyers must waive jury trial and class actions, and submit to binding arbitration in Port Alberni, BC (her chosen venue).
operational_rules_for_abov.whistleblower_protection: None. She has a 'bounty program' for employees who report colleagues' non-compliance — rewards paid from the reported employee's bonus.

persona.quote: We don't make mistakes — we make opponents pay for theirs. If you can't handle the heat, stay out of my airspace.
